testcase.name: verifyCourseWorkspaceSubTabsLayout

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.xpath: //main//button[contains(@class,'tab') or @type='button'] | //button[contains(text(), 'Dashboard')] | //button[contains(text(), 'Prepare')] (tried for 20 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
